data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for background checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Background checks' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding whether background checks are conducted as part of the booking process. The linked use case mentions background checks as a need, but there is no concrete evidence to confirm that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not address background checks, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming that background checks are performed before allowing bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the background check requirement.
